case_title: TONY BIN CHEN VS. MICHAEL LEE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, TONY BIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, MICHAEL $1,575.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
